title: Chingolo
writer: Carlos A. Olivari, Nicolas Olivari, Sixto Pondal Ríos
actors: Luis Sandrini, Nuri Montsé, Homero Cárpena
plot: A nicknamed homeless man saves a boy and the family wants to reward him with money but only accept a plate of food. So they decide to adopt him to transform him into a working man, which causes unraveling.
